rulings.description: one ruling per pooled finding, keyed by the finding id it was given

id.description: the stable finding id assigned by the orchestrator (e.g. F03)

severity.description: severity after this ruling (may differ from the critic's if DOWNGRADE)

rationale.description: one line: the quote/evidence that justifies KEEP/DOWNGRADE/DROP

soft_lenses.description: lenses that returned zero or only-Minor findings — flag whether genuinely empty or pulled punches
